data.name: Wild West Furry - Hentai Jigsaw
data.detailed_description:
The Wild West has never been this untamed…

In Wild West Furry – Hentai Jigsaw, dusty trails, scorching deserts, and smoky saloons become the stage for a bold and irresistible cast of furry outlaws. Step into a world where danger meets desire, and every puzzle reveals a new frontier of temptation.

Assemble 30 exclusive high-resolution illustrations featuring stunning furry cowgirls, fierce bounty hunters, seductive bandits, and wild desert beauties — each with her own attitude, charm, and undeniable allure.

Every completed puzzle unveils a new fantasy:
intense stares under wide-brim hats, soft fur glowing in the sunset, confident poses, and bodies shaped by the harsh and passionate life of the frontier.

This is the perfect experience for those who want to relax… and get lost in the heat of the Wild West. 🤠🔥🐾

⭐ Key Features

🧩 Three difficulty levels — 81, 196, or 361 pieces, tailored for both casual and dedicated players.

📸 30 exclusive images of sensual furry girls — cowgirls, sheriffs, bandits, desert wanderers, and unique hybrid characters.

🌵 Wild West variety — different body types, fur patterns, outfits, and themes ranging from rustic charm to bold, provocative styles.

📥 Download your favorite artworks and build your own gallery of western beauties.

🏆 Unlockable achievements — every completed puzzle brings that satisfying sense of conquest.

🎶 Relaxing western-inspired soundtrack, blending calm melodies with the spirit of the frontier.

🌟 Elegant and intuitive interface, crafted for a smooth and immersive experience.

⭐ Step into a land of dust, heat, and temptation…

where every взгляд tells a story,
and every piece brings you closer to something irresistible.

Wild West Furry – Hentai Jigsaw:
where the frontier isn’t just wild… it’s unforgettable. 🐎💖🔥

data.short_description: Explore the Wild West like never before! Solve challenging puzzles featuring stunning furry girls, unlock exclusive artworks, and enjoy a relaxing yet enticing experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 丹麥文*, 芬蘭文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
